title: Fleet, London, then Continent: France & Switzerland

main_route.normalized_name: Little Bramshott Farm Campsite, Fleet, Hampshire
main_route.excerpt: We arrived at Little Bramshott Farm campsite at 6.20. Near Fleet, Fussy owner, lovely oak Trees.

main_route.inference_reason: All family trips end at home unless diary states otherwise

excursions.label: Day trip to London (Harrods, Berkeley Hotel, Harvey Nichols)

stops.excerpt: We stopped off to see Eversley Church where we were married nearly 48 years ago.
Then on to Hounslow West, underground station, to park van.
We trained into London on the Piccadilly line + bought chocolates at Harrods.
On to the Berkeley Hotel + met Bobby + Steve in the lobby.
Then back to Harvey Nichols where we had a good lunch with Peter + Nana outside.

summary: Simon and Eve left Birmingham on 15 June 2022, kennelling the dog (Tinder) and stopping overnight at Little Bramshott Farm campsite near Fleet, Hampshire. The following day they made a day trip into London (Harrods, Berkeley Hotel, Harvey Nichols). The diary text then cuts off mid-sentence as they set off from Hounslow West; the France, Switzerland and possible Italy legs named in the trip title are not covered by any transcribed page in this bundle.
extraction_notes: Citation-correction pass: every retained non-home main_route stop and every excursion stop now carries a real page_id (B_0365_L) and a verbatim supporting excerpt. The only transcribed text is B_0365_L (B_0365_R has no body text, only a 'Harvey Nichols' caption). The words France, Switzerland, Continent and Italy occur ONLY in the trip_id slug and title_guess, never in the diary text, so the previous inferred crossing terminals (Dover, Calais), the dover-calais crossing, and the 'route unrecorded' France and Switzerland anchors had no supporting excerpt and have been moved to unresolved rather than kept uncited or backed by an excerpt that does not support them. main_route is now home -> Little Bramshott Farm campsite (Fleet) -> home. The date year 2022 is confirmed (15 June 2022 was a Wednesday, matching the diary). Travellers listed as Simon and Eve from the diary voice ('we').
